emails.subject: TETCO invoice - October production
emails.body: TETCO invoice October production Contract 910262, Deal 1072014 Pipe invoiced a demand rate of .035 ($1.085) on volume of 20,000. The rate in Sitara is .03. The amount of variance is $3,100. Which is correct? Thanks, Brenda

emails.subject: RE: TETCO invoice - October production
emails.body: RE: TETCO invoice October production sorry, tetco is right.... .035 Do I need to change the ticket? To: Townsend, Judy

emails.subject: RE: TETCO invoice - October production
emails.body: I'll change it. Thanks To: Fletcher, Brenda H.
